case_title: CHIU, ALLEN vs. STERL, THEO INGO

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT STERL, THEO INGO SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, ALLEN SERVED JAN-13-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STERL, THEO INGO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $110.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT STERL, THEO INGO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIU, ALLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STERL, THEO INGO $575.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.00
